metaData.Key Information: Our Taiwan Suncakes are freshly handmade with a delicate, flaky pastry and filled with smooth, lightly sweetened fillings in three delicious flavors: yam, original honey, and Musang King durian. Made with less sugar and absolutely no preservatives, each suncake offers a healthier, more natural taste while preserving the traditional charm of this beloved Taiwanese treat.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool and dry place. Keep away from direct sunlight.

metaData.Key Information: A buttery and flaky pastry with a generous filling of Crystal Jades honey char siew
metaData.Preparation:
Reheating instructions:
Option 1: Air Fry
Brush egg yolk on top of the puff pastry. Set air fryer to 180 C and place puff pastry in for 20 minutes. 

Option 2: Oven (top and bottom heat)
Brush egg yolk on top of the puff pastry. Set oven to 180 C and place puff pastry in for 18 minutes.

metaData.Key Information: The Century Line knives have been especially designed for intense use. They receive a thermal treatment which consists of hardening (heating the blade), subzero (cooling from 50 to -196 degrees), and tempering (increasing the steel elasticity) for a longer and more efficient life. The anatomical and ergonomic handle offers safety during use. Made of polycarbonate and fiberglass, the handle is directly injected on the steel bolster and finalized with aluminum rivets. The Century Line has a 25-year warranty covering manufacturing faults and is certified by the NSF, National Sanitation Foundation, an organization internationally recognized by its consultancy, inspection, and training practices aimed at guaranteeing the sanitation of food, water, air, and the environment. The pieces are dishwasher safe.<<
metaData.Preparation: Forged knife. Stainless steel blade 1810. Reinforced polycarbonate handle with fiberglass. 25 years warranty
